creator: Andrew.P.Lentvorski@FreeBSD.org
text:
The following is the dialog after having installed mysql-server-3.23.43

www# make deinstall
===>  Deinstalling for mysql-server-3.23.42
===>   mysql-server-3.23.42 not installed, skipping

However, the libtool which it installed to satisfy dependencies deinstalls
just fine ...

How-To-Repeat: make install mysql-server-3.23.42 and then try to make deinstall it.
